title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security.

title: Account Deletion
content: Users can delete their account from Account Settings.

title: Subscription Plans
content: We offer Free, Pro, and Enterprise subscription plans.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refund requests must be submitted within 7 days of purchase.

title: Two Factor Authentication
content: Users can enable two-factor authentication from Security Settings.
